calendar.matters:
Third Party Yamini Bhatnagar'S Petition For An Order To Determine The Validity Of The Third Party Claim
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Fred Keeperman telephone number 925-631-7710 for Plaintiff.
Yamini Bhatnagar telephone number 510-289-1662 Third Party in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court issued the following ruling.
Yamini Bhatnagar's Third Party Claim is denied. Mr. Keeperman is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Petition For An Order To Determine The Validity Of The Third Party Claim
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

THIRD PARTY YAMINI BHATNAGAR Petition For An Order To Determine The Validity Of The Third Party Claim is continued to January 13, 2016 on the Court's own motion.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Discharged
